talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: Ohio State University, College of Medicine, Division of Cancer Prevention and Control
talk_metadata.session_title: Innovations in Translating Social and Structural Determinants of Health Across Population, Community, and Basic Cancer Research
talk_metadata.talk_title: Social and Built Environmental Measures: Novel Spatiotemporal Approaches in Population Science
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We replicated this 23,000 times using Google Street View"
Speaker said: "Our Kappa coefficients are that we can measure these quite well"
Speaker said: "We saw that as disinvestment increases, survival time decreases for those diagnosed stage two or stage three"
Speaker said: "The confidence interval is a little wide there, so I think the p-value wasn't quite .05"

vulnerability_identified.failing_compound_or_target: Google Street View–based built environment audit
vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Spatial coverage bias – rural areas have fewer or older images, leading to incomplete exposure assessment

key_data_gaps: No longitudinal residential history for participants
Limited temporal resolution of Google Street View images in rural tracts

crispro_opportunity.description: Integrate CrisPRO's computational spine to combine spatiotemporal disinvestment scores with epigenetic age acceleration biomarkers for more precise risk modeling.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "We found that epigenetic age acceleration increases for each standard deviation increase in disinvestment"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model high‑dimensional exposure matrices and link them to epigenetic signatures, addressing the current gap between spatial exposure scores and molecular biomarkers.

crispro_opportunity.description: Use CrisPRO to simulate optimal sampling designs that mitigate spatial coverage bias identified in Google Street View audits.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "We have spatial autocorrelation, but coverage is uneven, especially in rural areas"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can predict information loss under different audit densities and recommend supplemental data collection strategies.

unresolved_questions: How does seasonal variation in Google Street View imagery affect disorder scoring?
Can the spatial model be validated against on‑ground audits in underserved neighborhoods?

talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: Fox Chase Cancer Center / Temple University
talk_metadata.session_title: Innovations in Translating Social and Structural Determinants of Health Across Population, Community, and Basic Cancer Research
talk_metadata.talk_title: Social and Structural Drivers of Health at the Intersection of Community and Basic Science Research
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We linked disinvestment measures to breast cancer‑specific survival in the Women's Circle of Health Follow‑Up Study"
Speaker said: "Epigenetic age acceleration increases for each standard deviation increase in disinvestment"
Speaker said: "The confidence interval is a little wide there, so I think the p-value wasn't quite .05"

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Potential confounding by individual socioeconomic status not fully captured despite adjustment
vulnerability_identified.unexplained_resistance_quote: Speaker said: "No such associations, or at least they're weaker associations, for those diagnosed stage one and stage four"

trial_dilution_risk.trial_name_or_nct: Women's Circle of Health Follow‑Up Study (observational cohort)
trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Impact of built‑environment disinvestment on breast cancer survival and epigenetic aging
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Cohort limited to Black women in urban New Jersey; limited generalizability to other races/regions
trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: Comprehensive panel of stress‑related biomarkers beyond epigenetic age
trial_dilution_risk.static_vs_dynamic_failure: Exposure measured at a single time point; temporal changes in disinvestment not captured in primary survival analysis
trial_dilution_risk.statistical_concern: Potential residual confounding by SES and treatment variables

competitive_moat_weakness.vulnerable_ip_or_chemistry: Google Street View–based disinvestment scoring pipeline
competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Relies on publicly available imagery; any change in Google data licensing could disrupt the workflow
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Focus on a single built‑environment dimension (disinvestment) may dilute signal when multiple SDOH interact

cognitive_dissonance: Speaker showed that disinvestment is associated with shorter breast cancer survival, then concluded that "we should focus on downstream individual behaviors" — ignoring the upstream exposure signal

key_data_gaps: No OS (overall survival) data presented, only accelerated failure time models
Limited longitudinal exposure data (no temporal dynamics of disinvestment)
Lack of mechanistic biomarkers beyond epigenetic age

crispro_opportunity.description: Apply CrisPRO to model how spatial disinvestment interacts with molecular stress pathways (e.g., epigenetic age) to predict survival, enabling identification of high‑risk subpopulations.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Epigenetic age acceleration increases for each standard deviation increase in disinvestment"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can integrate multilevel exposure matrices with epigenomic data to uncover causal pathways and refine risk stratification.

crispro_opportunity.description: Develop a composite risk score combining disinvestment exposure, SES, and tumor molecular features to improve prognostic models.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "We adjusted for individual SES but still saw survival differences"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO's machine‑learning framework can generate weighted scores from heterogeneous data streams.

unresolved_questions: Does the association between disinvestment and epigenetic age hold after adjusting for more granular stress biomarkers?
How do temporal changes in neighborhood disinvestment influence survival trajectories?

assets_to_track: Women's Circle of Health Follow‑Up Study cohort
